# RubyxQube — Email Templates

Copy-paste templates for client communications. Personalize the [brackets].

---

## Project Kickoff

**Subject:** Let's kick off your [Plan] — RubyxQube

Hi [First Name],

Your agreement is signed and payment is set — we're ready to go.

To get started, I need a few things from you:

- Logo files (PNG or SVG preferred, any size)
- 5–10 photos of your work, team, or location
- Your services list with rough pricing (or "contact for quote" if rates vary)
- The cities or zip codes you serve
- Your hours of operation
- Login to your current website (if rebuilding — WordPress admin, hosting panel, etc.)

Send whatever you have to this email. If you're missing something, send what you have and we'll figure out the rest.

Target launch: [X] weeks from today.

Boyd
RubyxQube LLC
(208) 970-8624

## Site Launch

**Subject:** Your site is live — [Business Name]

Hi [First Name],

Your site is live at [URL].

Here's what's included and active:

- Custom site at [URL]
- AI receptionist live and trained on your services
- Google Analytics and Search Console set up
- Google Business Profile linked

A few things to do on your end:
- Test the chatbot on your phone and desktop
- Check your hours and services are correct
- Send me your GBP login if you want me to update the profile

Your first monthly report will come in [Month]. I'll include traffic, search rankings, and lead capture data.

Questions about anything? Just reply here.

Boyd
RubyxQube LLC
(208) 970-8624

## Cancellation Acknowledgment

**Subject:** Cancellation confirmed — RubyxQube

Hi [First Name],

Your subscription has been cancelled and no further charges will be made.

A few things to know:

- Your site will remain live through the end of the current billing period ([Date])
- After that date, the site will go offline unless you arrange alternate hosting
- I can export your content and hand over the codebase for [fee] — let me know if you want that

It was great working with you. If you ever want to start back up or have questions, my door is open.

Boyd
RubyxQube LLC
(208) 970-8624

## Card Update Request (payment failed)

**Subject:** Quick card update needed — RubyxQube

Hi [First Name],

Heads up — Stripe wasn't able to process your last payment. It's usually just an expired card.

Here's a secure link to update your payment method — takes about 60 seconds:

[Stripe customer portal link — get from Stripe Dashboard → Customers → [client] → Actions → Send customer portal link]

Once updated, Stripe will retry automatically. Let me know if you have any questions.

Boyd
(208) 970-8624

## Follow-Up After Audit Call (prospect didn't sign)

**Subject:** Following up — RubyxQube audit

Hi [First Name],

Just following up from our call [last week / on [Date]].

Happy to answer any questions before you decide — pricing, timeline, how the AI works, anything. No pressure either way.

If now isn't the right time, I'll check back in a couple months. The site will be here when you're ready.
